view.title: Validate persona scenario #4

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for subscription status visibility.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Pause subscription with resume date', but the evidence provided does not demonstrate that this requirement is met. While there are multiple successful prior steps indicating customer interactions, there is no explicit evidence showing how subscription statuses (active/paused/cancelled) are displayed to the user. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but it lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or validation.
